name: Derek Thompson
title: Java Backend Engineer
summary: Senior backend engineer with 8 years of expertise in enterprise Java and distributed systems. Architected a microservices migration for a legacy monolith serving 2M+ users. Deep knowledge of system design, performance tuning, and event-driven architecture.

highlights: Architected migration of 10-year-old monolith to 14 microservices serving 2M+ users
Designed Kafka-based event streaming layer handling 50k events/second
Reduced average API latency by 65% through connection pooling and N+1 query elimination
Owned the order management service processing $500M in annual transactions
Introduced Elasticsearch for full-text order search, replacing costly DB full scans
Developed REST APIs for an enterprise HR platform used by 200+ companies
Maintained and extended Spring Batch jobs for nightly payroll processing
